title: Appearance Rate (over 30 days)
bodyHtml:
What is the Appearance Rate?

This rate reflects how closely you follow Back Market grading standards, how well you clean your devices before sending them to your customer, and how well items are protected during delivery. 

 

How is this rate calculated?

The number of orders supposed to be delivered in the past 30 days with customer contact linked to physical appearance issues (for example, scratches, dirty items, etc.) divided by the total number of orders supposed to be delivered in the past 30 days, including cancelled orders.

 

How does this rate impact me?

This rate highly influences customer trust in refurbished items and impacts you as a seller, as a commercial gesture will be offered to your customer in case of grade discrepancy. 

The Appearance Rate also impacts your ability to win the BackBox and may lead to sales suspensions if some of your item categories are among the worst compared to the average seller on Back Market. If this is the case, your listings in this item category will be suspended for 1 week.

 

Where can I find my rate?

You’ll find your Appearance Rate and more details in your Quality Insights dashboard.
